experiments.title: Existing ARM/ZRM frontier exploration
experiments.result: The existing base-revision explorer pins partial-carrier, exact-coverage, semantic-set, ordered-topology, and abstract authority-binding witnesses.

experiments.title: Complete reference-model test suite
experiments.result: Eighty-eight tests passed after adding nineteen composition-frontier tests and twenty-four deterministic authenticated-batch tests.

experiments.title: Lean total carrier, exact coverage, transcript separation, and strong accounting associativity
experiments.result: Seven Lake jobs completed. A source scan found no sorry, admit, or axiom declaration in the package.

experiments.title: Three compounding Research Kernel MCP runs
experiments.result: Seed run: 22 atoms, 13 edges, 6 refutation plans, 2 evidence attachments, and 5 reformulations. Privacy run: 12 hypotheses, 18 reformulations, 12 refutation plans, 39 edges, and 4 evidence records. Compound run: 10 hypotheses, 21 edges, 10 refutation records including one actual counterexample, 3 evidence records, and 6 reformulations, after retrieving 40 prior atoms.
limitations: The kernel event stream is not reconstructive.
The packet therefore treats kernel output as discovery provenance, not authority.

experiments.title: Composition algebra and context-bridge frontier
experiments.result: Across 12 programs, 8 states, 132 ordered program pairs, and 1,056 schedule checks, write-only certification produced 168 false-safe checks while fact-complete certification produced zero in the bounded domain. Six ordered permutations produced six roots; the sorting mutant produced one. A governed context bridge composed and the same-context-only mutant rejected it.

experiments.title: Bounded signed accounting versus monotone limbs
experiments.result: At signed bound 127, the left grouping is undefined while the right grouping returns 127. The replacement natural debit/credit merge is associative and its checked Option fold has identical value and definedness under both three-leaf groupings.

experiments.title: Deterministic authenticated batch serial refinement
experiments.result: Sixteen executions over eight valid states and two worker schedules had zero serial-refinement mismatches and zero schedule-variant states; eight stale results reexecuted. Four of four program-read substitutions rejected. Two omitted-dependency mutants collided under a program-only root, while complete decision roots distinguished both. Exact runtime types reject the Python boolean/integer equality trap, and the semantic root binds the exact ordered transaction manifest. Empty batches, invalid prestates, and unknown program tags rejected. The nullifier-only mutant violated the invariant in four of eight states and accepted both range phantoms.

experiments.title: External ESSO ZRM semantic model observation
experiments.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --no-project --with pyyaml --with z3-solver python examples/zrm/check_zrm_semantic_models.py
experiments.result: An external run observed eight models as inductive and fourteen seeded mutants as InvNotInductive. The repository cannot replay or independently authenticate that run, so it is context only and cannot satisfy a PR or promotion gate.

experiments.title: Evidence authority type-state campaign
experiments.result: Pending model of ConditionalReceipt, ResolvedReceipt, DeferredAccumulator, DecidedProof, and VerifiedPostcommitAggregationFact.
experiments.promotion_gate: Every constructor path from unresolved or deferred evidence to authority must be absent or rejected.

experiments.title: Private envelope leakage and revocation campaign
experiments.result: Pending field, size, timing, root, error, revocation, and cost-bucket differential.

experiments.title: Typed registry forest substitution campaign
experiments.result: Pending exhaustive cross-role leaf, root, version, and bridge substitutions.

experiments.title: Semantic versus proof identity campaign
experiments.result: Pending alternative encoding, topology, release, and replay-key substitutions plus proof-system malleability review.

experiments.title: Authenticated-state backend differential
experiments.result: Pending sorted-map and authenticated-tree adapters over one logical point/range/update oracle.

experiments.title: Sibling state-history commitment campaign
experiments.result: Pending cycle, fork, prefix, rollback, anchor, and atomic sibling-update mutants.

experiments.title: Phase-indexed commitment DAG campaign
experiments.result: Pending back-edge, unbound-field, double-bind, phase-substitution, and retry-cycle mutants.

experiments.title: Proof-carrying four-valued promotion campaign
experiments.result: Pending receipt substitution, self-support SCC, contested evidence, assurance-vector, deterministic replay, and exact descendant invalidation tests.

experiments.title: Reconstructive EventV2 and reducer campaign
experiments.result: Pending 10,000 generated histories, mutation rejection, crash injection at every transaction boundary, and independent Rust/Python encoding differential.

experiments.title: Private policy receipt composition campaign
experiments.result: Pending action, subject, snapshot, epoch, revocation, scope, nontransferability, and context-bridge substitutions.

experiments.title: HyperNova versus ProtoStar non-uniform circuit benchmark
experiments.result: Pending selected-step constraint cost, proof-state growth by circuit-kind count, lookup-heavy policy cost, final-decider cost, registry swap, and context mismatch tests.

experiments.title: Interval PCD and multi-folding campaign
experiments.result: Pending every Catalan tree, interval gap, overlap, duplication, reversal, arity substitution, degenerate challenge, and binary semantic refinement test.

experiments.title: Governed invariant-confluence fast-path campaign
experiments.result: Pending profile-scoped invariant-closure, complete-effect, externally observable result, deterministic fallback, and ordered-journal separation mutants.

tool_availability.research_kernel_mcp: executed through pinned local stdio server
tool_availability.esso: an external pinned-revision canonical-IR and Z3 run was observed; required receipt fields and solver version were not captured, private source is not vendored, and the record is non-gating
tool_availability.morph: pinned source was inspected and Research Kernel reformulation templates ran; full strict Morph replay did not run
tool_availability.risc_zero: source and official composition behavior were inspected; no new guest was built

non_claims: A specified experiment is not evidence that its hypothesis holds.
A bounded or abstract pass is not an end-to-end protocol, cryptographic, storage, or Rust-refinement proof.
Commands are replay recipes only when all referenced source, dependencies, fixtures, and toolchains are available and digest-bound.
